name: Picker
summary: The Picker class is used to pick points and objects in the drawing.
remarks: Prompts Tekla Structures prefixes the given prompt with "prompt_" and looks for a translation in the prompts.ail file. If the translation (e.g. "prompt_Pick_first_position") is not found in the prompts.ail file, the prompt string is displayed as such. This feature can be used to give already translated strings to the picker.

methods.name: IsInteractive
methods.summary: Indicates whether the picker is interactive and currently allowed to access the UI or not. If not, then the plug-in should avoid making dialog calls or message boxes.

returns.doc: True if the picker is interactive.

methods.name: PickObject(String)
methods.summary: Requests the user to pick one object. Returns the picked drawing object and the view in which the pick occurred.

params.name: prompt
params.doc: The prompt shown in the status bar before the pick. See the class remarks for more information about prompts.

throws.when: Thrown when the picker is being used through a plug-in which has invalid PluginPickerInputs defined.
Thrown when the user interrupts the picker before anything has been picked.

methods.name: PickObject(String, DrawingObject., ViewBase.)
methods.signature: public void PickObject(string prompt, out DrawingObject pickedObject, out ViewBase pickedView)
methods.summary: Requests the user to pick one object.

params.name: prompt
params.doc: The prompt shown in the status bar before the pick. See the class remarks for more information about prompts.

params.name: pickedObject
params.doc: The picked drawing object.

params.name: pickedView
params.doc: The view in which the pick occurred.

throws.when: Thrown when the picker is being used through a plug-in which has invalid PluginPickerInputs defined.
Thrown when the user interrupts the picker before anything has been picked.

methods.name: PickObject(String, DrawingObject., ViewBase., Point.)
methods.signature: public void PickObject(string prompt, out DrawingObject pickedObject, out ViewBase pickedView, out Point pickedPoint)
methods.summary: Requests the user to pick one object. Returns the picked point in addition to the picked object.

params.name: prompt
params.doc: The prompt shown in the status bar before the picks. See the class remarks for more information about prompts.

params.name: pickedObject
params.doc: The picked drawing object.

params.name: pickedView
params.doc: The view in which the pick occurred.

params.name: pickedPoint
params.doc: The picked point in the view coordinates.

throws.when: Thrown when the picker is being used through a plug-in which has invalid PluginPickerInputs defined.
Thrown when the user interrupts the picker before anything has been picked.

methods.name: PickObject(String, .Type[], DrawingObject., ViewBase., Point.)
methods.signature: public void PickObject(string prompt, Type[] typeFilter, out DrawingObject pickedObject, out ViewBase pickedView, out Point pickedPoint)
methods.summary: Requests the user to pick one object of the given types. Returns the picked point in addition to the picked object.
methods.remarks: The list of types to pick may contain any object derived from DrawingObject or DrawingObject itself. For example, typeof(ModelObject) will allow picking of part, bolts, reinforcements, etc.

params.name: prompt
params.doc: The prompt shown in the status bar before the picks. See the class remarks for more information about prompts.

params.name: typeFilter
params.doc: The types to pick. If null, any type is allowed.

params.name: pickedObject
params.doc: The picked drawing object.

params.name: pickedView
params.doc: The view in which the pick occurred.

params.name: pickedPoint
params.doc: The picked point in the view coordinates.

throws.when: Thrown when the picker is being used through a plug-in which has invalid PluginPickerInputs defined.
Thrown when the user interrupts the picker before anything has been picked.

methods.signature: public Tuple<DrawingObject, ViewBase, Point> PickObjectAndPoint(string prompt)

params.doc: The prompt shown in the status bar before the pick. See the class remarks for more information about prompts.

throws.when: Thrown when the picker is being used through a plug-in which has invalid PluginPickerInputs defined.

methods.name: PickPoints(StringList)
methods.summary: Requests picks of points from the user. The sequence is terminated by the middle button pick. Returns the picked points in the view coordinates and the view in which the pick occurred.

params.name: prompts
params.doc: The prompts shown in the status bar before the picks. See the class remarks for more information about prompts.

throws.when: Thrown when the picker is being used through a plug-in which has invalid PluginPickerInputs defined.
Thrown when the user interrupts the picker before anything has been picked.

methods.signature: public Tuple<PointList, ViewBase> PickPoints(int numberOfPicks, StringList prompts)
methods.summary: Requests N picks of points from the user. Returns the picked points in the view coordinates and the view in which the pick occurred.

params.name: numberOfPicks
params.doc: The number of requested picks.

params.name: prompts

throws.when: Thrown when the picker is being used through a plug-in which has invalid PluginPickerInputs defined.
Thrown when the user interrupts the picker before anything has been picked.
